# divider — Basic _(HTML/CSS)_

```css
@forward '@lucca-front/scss/src/components/divider';
@forward '@lucca-front/scss/src/components/button';
```

```html
<div ${…} class="divider ${…} ${…}"><button class="button">${…}</button></div>
```

```html
<div ${…} class="divider ${…} ${…}">
	<span class="lucca-icon icon-heart" aria-hidden="true"></span>
</div>
```

```html
<hr class="divider ${…} ${…}" />
```

```html
<div ${…} class="divider ${…} ${…}">${…}</div>
```
